title: About Encounter
description: **Encounter** is a personal intimacy tracking application designed to help you understand and reflect on your intimate relationships and experiences.
supportNote: For support or inquiries, please use the feedback feature in the app.
thankYou: Thank you for choosing Encounter to be part of your personal journey. This application was born from a simple belief: that understanding our intimate experiences can lead to greater self-awareness and healthier relationships.
privacyParamount: **Privacy is paramount**: Your intimate data is yours alone. We've built robust encryption and privacy features to ensure your information stays secure.
selfReflection: **Self-reflection matters**: Tracking patterns and trends in your intimate life can provide valuable insights into your wellbeing and relationship dynamics.
simplicity: **Simplicity is key**: The app is designed to be intuitive and non-intrusive, allowing you to focus on what matters most—your experiences.
partnerManagement: **Partner Management**: Keep track of your partners and their details
encounterLogging: **Encounter Logging**: Record your intimate experiences with rich details
analytics: **Analytics & Insights**: Visualize patterns and trends in your data
privacyControls: **Privacy Controls**: PIN protection, location privacy settings, and data export options
secureStorage: **Secure Storage**: All data is encrypted and stored securely
privacyProtection: We've implemented multiple layers of privacy protection:
locationTracking: - Configurable location tracking (off, city-level, or exact)
earlyVersion: This is an early version of Encounter, and we're committed to making it better. Your feedback is invaluable in shaping the future of this application. Please don't hesitate to share your thoughts, suggestions, or report any issues through our feedback feature.
thankYouMessage: Thank you for trusting us with your personal data. We take that responsibility seriously and will continue to work hard to earn and keep that trust.
